title: SQLite 驱动 + qlib collector 骨架与 Covers (Go)
description: 按计划 Task 5。go get modernc.org/sqlite@latest && go mod tidy。创建 internal/collector/qlib/qlib.go：Collector{db,maxStaleness(默认7*24h),now(默认time.Now),external}；New(db,opts...)+Option(WithMaxStaleness/WithClock/WithExternal)；实现 collector.Collector 接口 Name()=='qlib'/SupportedMarkets()={US,CNA,HK}/Init/Start(ctx context.Context) error/Stop 均 no-op（Start 签名以 internal/collector/interface.go 真实定义为准）；Covers(symbol) 查 warehouse_meta COUNT 大写匹配。严格 TDD：先写 qlib_test.go(newTestDB 建内存库) 确认 RED(undefined New) 再实现。

functional: New(db) 构造成功，Name()=='qlib' (TestNameIsQlib)，SupportedMarkets 含 MarketUS/MarketCNA/MarketHK
Covers 大小写不敏感命中 warehouse_meta：Covers('aapl')==true、Covers('MSFT')==false (TestCoversReportsWarehouseMembership)
boundary: Init/Start(ctx)/Stop 为 no-op 不报错；Start 签名与 collector.Collector 接口一致（编译通过即证）

non_functional.desc: go.mod 出现 modernc.org/sqlite；go test ./internal/collector/qlib/ -run 'TestCovers|TestName' -v PASS；先 RED(undefined New) 后 GREEN
